javascript:(function(){if(document.getElementById('sc-ov'))return;const s=document.createElement('style');s.textContent=`@keyframes scFadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}@keyframes scSlideUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px) scale(.98)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}}@keyframes scSkShimmer{0%{background-position:200% 0}100%{background-position:-200% 0}}@keyframes scSkPulse{0%,100%{opacity:.4}50%{opacity:1}}@keyframes scDot{0%,100%{opacity:.3;transform:translateY(0)}50%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(-2px)}}@keyframes scSpin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}@keyframes scFadeSlide{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}@keyframes confettiFall{0%{transform:translate3d(0,-12vh,0) rotate(0deg) scale(.9);opacity:0}10%{opacity:1}100%{transform:translate3d(var(--drift,0px),115vh,0) rotate(720deg) scale(1);opacity:0}}@keyframes scPop{0%{transform:scale(.9);opacity:0}60%{transform:scale(1.08)}100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1}}.sc-ov{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.92);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:2147483647;font-family:"Builder Sans","Gotham SSm",system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;color:#fff;animation:.3s ease-out scFadeIn;contain:layout style;isolation:isolate}.sc-confetti-layer{position:absolute;inset:0;overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none;z-index:0}.sc-m{background:rgb(19,21,26);border-radius:16px;width:clamp(320px,min(90vw,460px),460px);max-height:85vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:rgba(0,0,0,.7) 0 32px 80px,rgba(255,255,255,.07) 0 0 0 1px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;z-index:1;animation:.4s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) both scSlideUp;contain:layout paint}.sc-flash{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgb(245,158,11);pointer-events:none;opacity:0;z-index:20;border-radius:16px}.sc-hd{padding:18px 20px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);background:rgba(255,255,255,.01)}.sc-hd-icon{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:9px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgb(26,46,36),rgb(22,42,32));border:1px solid rgba(34,197,94,.2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0}.sc-hd-icon svg{width:17px;height:17px;fill:rgb(34,197,94)}.sc-ht{flex:1;min-width:0}.sc-ht h2{margin:0;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.1px;color:rgb(240,240,240)}.sc-ht p{margin:2px 0 0;font-size:11.5px;color:rgb(82,84,92)}.sc-g{padding:10px 14px 14px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:7px;overflow-y:auto;max-height:55vh;scrollbar-width:none}.sc-g::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}.sc-g-single{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr);place-items:center;padding-top:18px}.sc-sk{background:rgb(26,28,34);border-radius:10px;padding:7px;border:1.5px solid transparent}.sc-sk-th{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1/1;border-radius:7px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgb(26,28,34) 30%,rgb(34,36,42) 50%,rgb(26,28,34) 70%) 0 0/200% 100%;animation:1.5s linear infinite scSkShimmer}.sc-sk-ln{height:10px;border-radius:4px;margin-top:6px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgb(26,28,34) 30%,rgb(34,36,42) 50%,rgb(26,28,34) 70%) 0 0/200% 100%;animation:1.5s linear infinite scSkShimmer}.sc-sk-ln.short{width:60%}.sc-item{background:rgb(26,28,34);border-radius:10px;padding:7px;border:1.5px solid transparent;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s,transform .15s,box-shadow .2s}.sc-g-single .sc-item{width:110px}.sc-item:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12);transform:scale(1.03);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}.sc-item-img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:1/1;border-radius:7px;object-fit:cover;display:block;background:rgb(19,21,26);pointer-events:none}.sc-item-rap{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:rgb(240,240,240);margin-top:6px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.sc-item-id{font-size:10px;color:rgb(82,84,92);margin-top:2px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}.sc-ft{padding:10px 14px 14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.15)}.sc-ft-brand{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:rgb(82,84,92);letter-spacing:.3px}.sc-ft-loading{justify-content:center}.sc-ft-loading>span{font-size:13px;color:rgb(82,84,92);animation:1.8s ease-in-out infinite scSkPulse}.sc-dots{margin-left:4px;display:inline-flex;gap:3px;vertical-align:middle}.sc-dots span{display:inline-block;width:3px;height:3px;background:currentColor;border-radius:50%;opacity:.3}.sc-dots span:nth-child(1){animation:1.2s ease infinite scDot}.sc-dots span:nth-child(2){animation:1.2s ease .2s infinite scDot}.sc-dots span:nth-child(3){animation:1.2s ease .4s infinite scDot}.sc-check-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:28px 24px 24px;gap:0;grid-column:1/-1;width:100%;max-width:290px;margin:0 auto}.sc-check-img{width:88px;height:88px;border-radius:14px;object-fit:cover;display:block;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);margin-bottom:18px}.sc-check-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:rgb(240,240,240);margin-bottom:6px}.sc-check-status{font-size:12px;color:rgb(82,84,92);min-height:18px;animation:scFadeSlide .2s ease-out;margin-bottom:18px;text-align:center}.sc-check-steps{width:100%;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;margin-bottom:4px}.sc-step{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:9px;background:rgb(26,28,34);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);transition:border-color .3s,background .3s}.sc-step.done{border-color:rgba(34,197,94,.2);background:rgba(34,197,94,.05)}.sc-step.active{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.1);background:rgb(30,32,38)}.sc-step-icon{width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;background:rgb(34,34,40);border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;font-size:9px;transition:background .3s,border-color .3s}.sc-step.done .sc-step-icon{background:rgba(34,197,94,.15);border-color:rgba(34,197,94,.5);color:rgb(34,197,94)}.sc-step.active .sc-step-icon{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.2)}.sc-step-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);animation:scSkPulse 1s infinite}.sc-step-label{font-size:11.5px;color:rgb(130,132,140);flex:1;text-align:left;transition:color .3s}.sc-step.done .sc-step-label{color:rgb(180,182,190)}.sc-step.active .sc-step-label{color:rgb(210,212,220)}.sc-step-check{font-size:10px;color:rgb(34,197,94);opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}.sc-step.done .sc-step-check{opacity:1}.sc-progress{width:100%;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:99px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:18px}.sc-progress-bar{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgb(34,197,94),rgb(16,185,129));border-radius:99px;width:0%;transition:width .35s ease}.sc-done-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;gap:6px;padding:8px 0 4px;width:100%}.sc-done-label{font-size:14px;font-weight:800;color:rgb(34,197,94);letter-spacing:-.2px}.sc-confetti-piece{position:absolute;top:-12vh;width:12px;height:20px;border-radius:999px;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;animation:confettiFall var(--dur,.9s) ease-out forwards;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(255,255,255,.18))}`; document.head.appendChild(s);  const skels=Array.from({length:6},(_,i)=>`<div class="sc-sk"><div class="sc-sk-th" style="animation-delay:${i*.1}s"></div><div class="sc-sk-ln" style="animation-delay:${i*.1}s"></div><div class="sc-sk-ln short" style="animation-delay:${i*.1+.05}s"></div></div>`).join('');  const h=document.createElement('div'); h.innerHTML=`<div class="sc-ov" id="sc-ov"><div class="sc-confetti-layer" id="sc-confetti-layer"></div><div class="sc-m" id="sc-modal"><div class="sc-flash" id="sc-flash"></div><div class="sc-hd"><div class="sc-hd-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 1L3 5v6c0 5.55 3.84 10.74 9 12 5.16-1.26 9-6.45 9-12V5l-9-4z"></path></svg></div><div class="sc-ht"><h2 id="sc-t">Select Items to Scan</h2><p id="sc-st">Loading your inventory</p></div></div><div class="sc-g" id="sc-g">${skels}</div><div class="sc-ft sc-ft-loading" id="sc-ft"><span>Fetching limiteds<span class="sc-dots"><span></span><span></span><span></span></span></span></div></div></div>`; const el=h.firstChild; el.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===el){el.remove();s.remove();}}); document.body.appendChild(el);  setTimeout(()=>{   document.getElementById('sc-st').textContent='Loaded';   const grid=document.getElementById('sc-g');   grid.classList.add('sc-g-single');   grid.innerHTML=`<div class="sc-item" id="sc-item"><img class="sc-item-img" src="data:image/webp;base64," crossorigin="anonymous"/><div class="sc-item-rap">976,624 RAP</div><div class="sc-item-id">ID 527365852</div></div>`;   const ft=document.getElementById('sc-ft');   ft.className='sc-ft';   ft.innerHTML='<span class="sc-ft-brand">rbxlive.com</span>';    document.getElementById('sc-item').addEventListener('click',()=>{     const steps=[       {label:'Checking item integrity'},       {label:'Verifying asset ID'},       {label:'Checking dev tool flags'},       {label:'Cross-referencing RAP'},       {label:'Scanning trade history'},       {label:'Confirming item hash'},     ];     grid.classList.remove('sc-g-single');     grid.innerHTML=`<div class="sc-check-wrap">       <img class="sc-check-img" src="data:image/webp;base64,"/>       <div class="sc-check-title">Checking item</div>       <div class="sc-check-status" id="sc-status">Initializing scan...</div>       <div class="sc-progress"><div class="sc-progress-bar" id="sc-bar"></div></div>       <div class="sc-check-steps" id="sc-steps">${steps.map((_,i)=>`<div class="sc-step" id="sc-step-${i}"><div class="sc-step-icon"><div class="sc-step-dot"></div></div><div class="sc-step-label">${steps[i].label}</div><div class="sc-step-check">â</div></div>`).join('')}</div>     </div>`;      const totalScanDuration=11500;     const stepDelay=Math.round(totalScanDuration/steps.length);     let i=0;     const bar=document.getElementById('sc-bar');     const iv=setInterval(()=>{       const stepEl=document.getElementById(`sc-step-${i}`);       if(stepEl){stepEl.classList.remove('active');stepEl.classList.add('done');}       i++;       const pct=Math.round((i/steps.length)*100);       if(bar)bar.style.width=pct+'%';       const status=document.getElementById('sc-status');       if(i<steps.length){         const next=document.getElementById(`sc-step-${i}`);         if(next)next.classList.add('active');         if(status)status.textContent=steps[i].label+'...';       }       if(i>=steps.length){         clearInterval(iv);         const title=document.querySelector('.sc-check-title');         if(title)title.remove();         if(status)status.remove();         setTimeout(()=>{           const stepsWrap=document.getElementById('sc-steps');           if(stepsWrap)stepsWrap.remove();           const wrap=document.querySelector('.sc-check-wrap');           if(wrap)wrap.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend',`<div class="sc-done-wrap"><div class="sc-done-label">Item Clean</div></div>`);           const colors=['#f59e0b','#22c55e','#3b82f6','#a855f7','#ef4444','#ec4899','#06b6d4','#f97316'];           const confettiLayer=document.getElementById('sc-confetti-layer');           Array.from({length:52}).forEach((_,k)=>{             const c=document.createElement('div');             c.className='sc-confetti-piece';             const fromLeft=k%2===0;             const leftBase=fromLeft?8+Math.random()*18:74+Math.random()*18;             const drift=fromLeft?80+Math.random()*120:-80-Math.random()*120;             const duration=(0.9+Math.random()*0.9).toFixed(2);             c.style.cssText=`left:${leftBase}%;background:${colors[k%colors.length]};animation-delay:${Math.random()*.25}s;--drift:${drift}px;--dur:${duration}s;transform:rotate(${Math.random()*360}deg)`;             if(confettiLayer)confettiLayer.appendChild(c);             setTimeout(()=>c.remove(),2200);           });         },300);       }     },stepDelay);   }); },800);})();
